! Epoca Shield Smoke Test Fixture
! Representative sample of real EasyList / AdGuard filter patterns.
! Used by tests/bulk_filter_smoke.rs to validate our ABP→WebKit-regex
! translator does not produce patterns that WebKit's content rule engine rejects.
!
! Each section exercises a distinct category of ABP filter syntax.
! Patterns that should be DROPPED by the parser are clearly annotated.
[Adblock Plus 2.0]

! ─── 1. Common domain-anchor block rules ────────────────────────────────────
||doubleclick.net^
||googleadservices.com^
||googlesyndication.com^
||google-analytics.com^
||adservice.google.com^
||pagead2.googlesyndication.com^
||securepubads.g.doubleclick.net^
||amazon-adsystem.com^
||ads.twitter.com^
||analytics.twitter.com^
||ads.linkedin.com^
||ads.facebook.com^
||connect.facebook.net^
||ads.yahoo.com^
||adserver.yahoo.com^
||adsystem.amazon.com^
||adnxs.com^
||adsrvr.org^
||rubiconproject.com^
||pubmatic.com^
||openx.net^
||appnexus.com^
||criteo.com^
||moatads.com^
||scorecardresearch.com^
||quantserve.com^
||chartbeat.com^
||hotjar.com^
||fullstory.com^
||mouseflow.com^
||clarity.ms^
||amplitude.com^
||mixpanel.com^
||segment.com^
||heap.io^
||intercom.io^
||olark.com^
||livechatinc.com^
||drift.com^
||hubspot.com^
||marketo.com^
||pardot.com^
||outbrain.com^
||taboola.com^
||revcontent.com^
||mgid.com^
||media.net^
||bidswitch.net^
||adtech.de^
||adzerk.net^
||serving-sys.com^
||advertising.com^
||adbrite.com^
||adroll.com^
||tremorhub.com^
||yieldmo.com^
||sharethrough.com^
||indexexchange.com^
||sovrn.com^
||lijit.com^
||casalemedia.com^
||contextweb.com^
||spotxchange.com^
||undertone.com^
||conversantmedia.com^
||zucks.net^
||yieldmanager.com^

! ─── 2. Domain-anchor rules with third-party option ─────────────────────────
||ads.example.com^$third-party
||tracker.example.com^$third-party
||cdn.ads.com^$third-party
||analytics.example.com^$third-party
||adsystem.example.com^$third-party
||pixel.example.com^$third-party
||telemetry.example.com^$third-party
||events.example.com^$third-party
||beacon.example.com^$third-party
||impression.example.com^$third-party

! ─── 3. Domain-anchor rules with resource type options ──────────────────────
||cdn.ads.com^$script
||ads.example.com^$script,third-party
||tracker.com^$xmlhttprequest,third-party
||cdn.tracking.com^$image,third-party
||analytics.example.com^$script,~third-party
||js.tracking.com^$script,image
||static.ads.com^$stylesheet,third-party
||media.ads.com^$media,third-party
||font.ads.com^$font,third-party
||ws.ads.com^$websocket,third-party

! ─── 4. Domain-anchor rules with domain= option ─────────────────────────────
||ads.example.com^$domain=news.com
||tracker.com^$domain=news.com|blog.com
||ads.example.com^$domain=news.com|tech.com|~safe.com
||tracker.com^$domain=~mysite.com
||analytics.com^$third-party,domain=site1.com|site2.com

! ─── 5. Exception (allowlist) rules ─────────────────────────────────────────
@@||safe.example.com^
@@||cdn.example.com^$script
@@||fonts.googleapis.com^$stylesheet
@@||ajax.googleapis.com^$script
@@||ajax.aspnetcdn.com^$script
@@||cdnjs.cloudflare.com^$script
@@||unpkg.com^$script
@@||jsdelivr.net^$script
@@||stackpath.bootstrapcdn.com^$stylesheet
@@||maxcdn.bootstrapcdn.com^$stylesheet

! ─── 6. Cosmetic rules — these produce no url_pattern ───────────────────────
##.ad-banner
##.ads-wrapper
##.sidebar-ad
##.bottom-ad
##.top-ad
##[class^="ad-"]
##[id^="ad-"]
##[class*="-ad-"]
##[class*="Advertisement"]
##.promoted-post
##.sponsored-content
##.ad-container
##.ad-unit
##.ad-label
##.adsense
##.AdSense
##[aria-label="Ads"]
##[aria-label="Sponsored"]
##[data-ad-slot]
##[data-ad-client]
##.google-ads
##.GoogleAds
##.gpt-ad
##.dfp-ad
##.dfp-slot
##ins.adsbygoogle
##.widget_googleadsbygoogle
example.com##.promoted-post
news.example.com##.sponsored-content
blog.example.com##.ad-unit
shopping.example.com##.sponsored
social.example.com##.ad-container

! ─── 7. Wildcard patterns ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
*/tracking/*
*/analytics/collect*
*/pixel.png*
*/1x1.gif*
*/ad/*.js$script
*/ads/*.js$script
*/banner*.js$script,third-party
*googletagmanager.com/gtm.js$script
*/events/track*$xmlhttprequest
*/conversion/track*
*/impression/view*
*/pixel/fire*
*adserver.example.com*
*tracking.example.com*
*/ad-manager/*
*/ad-network/*
*/doubleclick/*
*/adsense/*

! ─── 8. Path/line-anchor patterns ───────────────────────────────────────────
|https://ad.example.com/
|https://ads.example.com/pixel
|https://tracking.example.com/collect
|https://analytics.example.com/events
|https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/
|https://tpc.googlesyndication.com/
|https://ade.googlesyndication.com/
|https://adservice.google.com/adsid/

! ─── 9. Patterns with hyphens, numbers, TLD variations ─────────────────────
||ad-server.example.com^
||ad-delivery.net^$third-party
||ad123.example.com^
||ads2.example.com^$third-party
||ad-tracker.example.com^$script
||ad-analytics.example.com^$xmlhttprequest
||tracker123.net^$third-party
||beacon-01.example.com^$image
||pixel-server.example.com^$image,third-party
||events-api.example.com^$xmlhttprequest,third-party

! ─── 10. Multi-option edge cases ────────────────────────────────────────────
||example.com^$script,image,stylesheet,third-party
||example.com^$script,image,media,font,websocket
||example.com^$xmlhttprequest,subdocument,third-party
||example.com^$ping,third-party
||ads.example.com^$cookie

! ─── 11. Patterns that exercise the `^` separator at end of domain ──────────
||ads.example.com^
||ads.example.co.uk^
||ads.example.io^
||ads.example.app^
||ads.example.dev^
||tracker.example.org^
||analytics.example.net^

! ─── 12. Patterns with paths and separators mid-URL ─────────────────────────
||example.com/ads^
||example.com/api/v2/tracking^$xmlhttprequest
||example.com/pixel.gif^$image
||example.com/beacon.png^$image
||example.com/conversion^$xmlhttprequest

! ─── 13. Raw regex patterns — MUST ALL BE DROPPED ───────────────────────────
! These start with `/`. Our parser drops all `/`-prefixed patterns because
! they are ABP raw-regex syntax that WebKit's restricted engine cannot handle.
! Every pattern in this section should produce zero FilterRules.
/addyn|*;adtech;
/addyn|*|adtech;
/^https?:\/\/(35|104)\.(\d){1,3}\.(\d){1,3}\.(\d){1,3}\//$popup,third-party
/^(https?:\/\/)?ad\./
/banner[0-9]*/
/\bad\b/
/\.ad\./
/ads?\./
/^https?:\/\/([a-z0-9]+\.)?doubleclick\.net\//
/adid=[0-9]+/
/\.ad\.[a-z]{2,3}\//
/(^|\.)(ad|ads|adserver|adservice)\./
/^https?:\/\/(ad|ads)\./
/\/ad[0-9]*\//
/sponsored-content/
/advertisement/

! ─── 14. Exception cosmetic rules — skipped by parser ───────────────────────
example.com#@#.ad-banner
news.com#@#.promoted

! ─── 15. Comment lines — all skipped ────────────────────────────────────────
! This is a comment
! checksum: abcdef12345
! Version: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z
! Expires: 4 days (update frequency)
! Homepage: https://easylist.to
! Licence: https://easylist.to/pages/licence.html

! ─── 16. Real EasyList/AdGuard patterns that historically caused errors ──────
! These are the exact lines (or close variants) that appeared in cached lists
! and produced "Error while parsing" from WKContentRuleListStore.
/addyn|*;adtech;
/^https?:\/\/(35|104)\.(\d){1,3}\.(\d){1,3}\.(\d){1,3}\//$popup,3p
||35.104.*^$script
||35.104.0.0/16^$script,third-party
